name: Cowbell AI-Powered Cyber Insurance API
what_it_does: Cowbell AI-powered cyber insurance REST API for insurance brokers, MGAs, and enterprise risk platforms to access AI-driven cyber risk assessment, automated quote generation, continuous risk rating, and policy management for SMB and mid-market businesses — enabling instant cyber coverage bindable quotes, Cowbell Factor risk scoring, and ongoing cyber posture monitoring through Cowbell's pure-play cyber insurance platform. Enables AI agents to manage risk scoring for Cowbell Factor cyber risk rating automation, handle quote generation for instant bindable cyber quote automation, access policy management for cyber coverage lifecycle automation, retrieve coverage recommendation for AI-driven limit and deductible automation, manage renewal for automated cyber policy renewal automation, handle risk monitoring for continuous cyber threat alerting automation, access broker workflow for cyber placement and management automation, retrieve claims for cyber incident submission automation, manage endorsement for policy modification automation, and integrate Cowbell with broker management systems and risk assessment platforms for automated cyber underwriting workflow.
use_cases: Generating instant bindable cyber insurance quotes using Cowbell's AI risk scoring for broker automation agents
Accessing Cowbell Factor risk scores for SMB cyber security posture assessment automation agents
Managing cyber insurance policy lifecycle and renewals for MGA and wholesale broker platform automation agents
Monitoring policyholder cyber risk changes for proactive risk management and alert automation agents
not_for: Personal lines cyber insurance (Cowbell focuses on SMB and mid-market business cyber)
Property, liability, or non-cyber commercial lines (Cowbell is pure-play cyber insurer)
Very large enterprise (Cowbell targets SMB to mid-market, not Fortune 500 specialty programs)
best_when: A cyber insurance broker, MGA, or digital insurance platform wanting AI agents to generate instant bindable cyber quotes, access AI risk scores, and automate cyber insurance placement for SMB and mid-market businesses through Cowbell's pure-play cyber underwriting API.
avoid_when: LICENSED BROKER REQUIRED: Cowbell distributes through licensed insurance brokers; automated direct consumer binding assumption creates unauthorized insurance sales; automated must be licensed P&C broker before API access. STATE REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Cowbell operates under state insurance regulations; automated uniform national cyber product assumption creates state-specific availability gaps; automated must verify state-specific product availability. COWBELL FACTOR IS PROPRIETARY: Cowbell Factor risk scores are based on Cowbell's proprietary AI model; automated generic risk score interpretation assumption creates mismatched scoring logic; automated must use Cowbell's risk factor documentation for interpretation. INSTANT BIND HAS ELIGIBILITY LIMITS: Not all cyber applications qualify for instant binding; automated always-instant-bind assumption creates referred or declined applications for ineligible risks; automated must handle referral and declination outcomes.

auth.notes: Cowbell uses API key + OAuth2 for broker API authentication. REST API with JSON. Pleasanton, CA HQ. Founded 2019 by Jack Kudale. Products: Cowbell Prime (cyber insurance), Cowbell Factor (AI risk score), continuous monitoring, claims support, risk engineering. SDKs: None public. AM Best A- rated carrier. Backed by investors including Aon, Anthem, SoftBank. SMB and mid-market focus. Competes with Coalition and At-Bay for AI cyber insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Broker sandbox for approved partners; production requires broker agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Insurance premium-based (broker commission); API access fees may apply for high-volume brokers
pricing.notes: Pleasanton CA. AM Best A-. Broker distribution. SoftBank-backed. SMB and mid-market pure-play cyber.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; quote and bind APIs throttled per broker tier

known_agent_gotchas: COWBELL FACTOR SCORE INTERPRETATION: Cowbell Factor risk scores (0-100 scale) have specific interpretation guidelines; automated generic risk scale assumption creates misinterpretation; automated must use Cowbell's Factor documentation for correct score interpretation and threshold setting

INSTANT BIND ELIGIBILITY VARIES: Not all submissions qualify for instant binding; businesses with complex risk profiles are referred for underwriting review; automated always-bindable assumption creates referred_for_review state requiring manual handling; automated must implement referral workflow

STATE AVAILABILITY CHECK REQUIRED: Cowbell cyber products are not available in all US states; automated national availability assumption creates state_not_available; automated must check Cowbell state availability before submission

CONTINUOUS MONITORING GENERATES ALERTS: Cowbell's ongoing cyber monitoring generates alerts when risk factors change; automated one-time assessment assumption misses policyholder risk changes; automated must implement webhook handler for monitoring alerts

COVERAGE RECOMMENDATION IS AI-DRIVEN: Cowbell's AI recommends coverage limits and deductibles based on risk; automated ignoring coverage recommendations creates potential coverage adequacy issues; automated should surface Cowbell's AI coverage recommendations to brokers and insureds
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cyber insurance AI underwriting. State DOI, NAIC, CCPA. API key + OAuth2. US. Business cyber risk and policy data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AI cyber insurance. State DOI, NAIC. API key + OAuth2. US. Business cyber risk and insurance data.
